title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Kanjuro, Momonosuke, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Toki as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: 01! Where are you going? Kanjuro! Momo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Return Lord Mo- Mono- Suke to us at once!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's okay to assume that Kanjuro is the spy, right Robin-chan?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: seems like it. We have to save him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy!! They are saying Kanjuro was the spy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He is escaping through the clouds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Is that true?! Since the very beginning?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What the hell is this cloud?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have a bad feeling about that cloud

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's probably another of his techniques that we've never seen before again

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Rain down on them! Ink arrows!

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Please I beg you, stop it Kanjuro,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's exactly right. Everyone will die at long last and along with..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They dangled hope in front of everyone's eyes and extended their time of death by 20 years.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, the general of those Hardy Samural is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An empty coward of a kid that is scared of heights.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kakaka... that's something worth laughing at.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I know it better than anyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's exactly what the enemy wants!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I promise will get out of this on my own, so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do I do... It's impossible for me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want you to defeat Kaido and Crochi and Protect Wano!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With this, no one will come save me... but...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 53 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
